channel.title: direct_rss Feed (Published)
channel.description: direct_rss feed for the AI x Finance product

item.title: Financial Services Build financial resilience with AI-powered tabletop exercises on Google Cloud By Florian Graf • 5-minute read
item.description: Title explicitly mentions 'AI-powered tabletop exercises' for 'Financial Services' and 'financial resilience', directly addressing both AI technology and the financial industry.

item.title: Financial Services Introducing an agentic commerce solution for merchants from PayPal and Google Cloud By Rohit Bhat • 4-minute read
item.description: Explicitly mentions 'agentic commerce solution' (AI agents) for merchants from PayPal (financial services) and Google Cloud, directly covering both AI and finance.

item.title: Modernizing regulated industries with cloud and agentic AI
item.description: Source is explicitly Microsoft Financial Services Blog and content discusses agentic AI for modernizing regulated industries, which clearly includes financial services.

item.title: The agentic moment in banking: A blueprint for better customer experiences
item.description: Title explicitly mentions 'agentic' (AI agents) and 'banking', directly addressing the intersection of AI and finance.

item.title: From bottlenecks to breakthroughs: How agentic AI is reshaping insurance
item.description: Title explicitly mentions both 'agentic AI' (artificial intelligence) and 'insurance' (financial industry), indicating direct coverage of AI's impact on a financial sector.

item.title: Microsoft and Cognizant: Delivering on the promise of agentic AI adoption in insurance
item.description: Title explicitly discusses 'agentic AI adoption' (AI technology) in 'insurance' (financial industry vertical), directly addressing both required domains

item.title: AI transformation in financial services: 5 predictors for success in 2026
item.description: Title explicitly mentions both AI transformation and financial services, directly addressing their intersection

item.title: 26 February 2026 BRIEF 🚨NEW: Evident AI Index | Payments🚨 View → 5 min
item.description: The candidate is clearly about both AI (Evident AI Index) and finance (Payments), specifically focusing on the intersection of AI in the payments sector of the financial industry.

item.title: 19 February 2026 BRIEF AI remakes the org chart View → 5 min
item.description: The article from Evident Banking Brief discusses how AI is transforming organizational structures in the banking industry, making it clearly about both AI and finance.

item.title: 05 February 2026 BRIEF Betting the house on AI View → 5 min
item.description: The title explicitly mentions AI in the context of banking, and the source is specifically a banking-focused publication. The phrase 'betting the house on AI' indicates a discussion about major AI investments or strategies within the banking sector.
